chunks.text: THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Present: Mr. Justice Adnan Iqbal Chaudhry Mr. Justice Muhammad Jaffer Raza C.P. No. D – 5594 of 2025 [Zanctok Pharmaceutical Laboratories vs. FOP & others] Petitioner: Zanctok Pharmaceutical Laboratories through Mr. Rashid Mureed, Advocate. Date of hearing: 26-11-2025 Date of decision: 26-11-2025 O R D E R Adnan Iqbal Chaudhry J. – The Petitioner has challenged a decision of the Registration Board constituted under the Drugs Act, 1976, requiring the Petitioner to change the name and packaging of its registered drug on the ground that it resembles another drug previously registered. Apparently, section 9 of the Drugs Act, 1976 provides an appeal to the Appellate Board against any decision of the Registration Board. Therefore, the Petitioner has an alternate remedy. The petition is thus dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE SHABAN*
